name: Orange Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chicken breast by skinning and boning it.
2. In a bowl, combine the shredded orange peel, ground cinnamon, orange juice, and cornstarch.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Add the broken walnut meats to the mixture and stir gently.
5. If using, add the cucumber roses for garnish.
6. Serve the seasoned chicken breast with cooked rice on the side.
